message:
feat(FJ-P2C-005-E): unit + property tests for cache key sensitivity, compatibility, and persistence

Adds 11 new tests covering all 8 required categories:
- Key sensitivity: 7 tests verifying each field change produces different key
  (mode, backend, transforms, compile_options, custom_hook, hook_none_vs_some, jaxpr)
- Compatibility matrix: 2 tests for row format with/without features
- Property: distinct backends → distinct keys (proptest)
- Persistence: wire format round-trip integration test

36 total fj-cache tests. All 8 bead categories covered.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
